# AimFast.Dev — Trend Discovery Engine

> Automated trend discovery platform scanning 31+ sources (HN, Reddit, GitHub, Product Hunt, X, DEV, V2EX, Lobsters) nightly with an LLM pipeline. Tracks 150+ emerging tech terms with Builder Score, stage classification, and cross-source validation. Free, no signup.

## Home
https://www.aimfast.dev/ - Daily tracking of new tech terms, concepts, and market signals. Builder Score (0-100), stage badges, source diversity metrics.

## Trends Dashboard
https://www.aimfast.dev/ - Browse all 150+ tracked terms. Filter by maturity stage (Nascent/Emergent/Validating/Rising), product type, category, and AI-focus. Sort by Builder Score, momentum, or mention volume.

## Reports
https://www.aimfast.dev/reports - Archived daily trend digests with LLM-generated analysis of top emerging terms, source breakdowns, and market signals.

## Articles
https://www.aimfast.dev/articles - In-depth analysis on emerging technology trends, market intelligence, and signals from the discovery pipeline.

## Pricing
https://www.aimfast.dev/pricing - Plans for the monitoring engine: topic watchlists and daily actionable alerts.
